compounds.name: KLOW
compounds.sequence: Multi-peptide blend (not a single molecule); reported components: KPV + LL-37 + GHK-Cu plus additional repair/anti-inflammatory peptides.
compounds.storage: Lyophilized: -20°C, 24+ months. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks.
compounds.research_area: Studied in laboratory models as a multi-peptide combination for its role in tissue-repair, anti-inflammatory, and skin-remodeling pathways.

compounds.name: GLOW
compounds.sequence: Multi-peptide blend; components: GHK-Cu + BPC-157 + TB-500.
compounds.storage: Lyophilized: -20°C, 24+ months. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks.
compounds.research_area: Studied in laboratory models as a combination peptide preparation for its role in tissue-repair, angiogenesis, and skin/collagen-remodeling pathways.

compounds.name: Retatrutide
compounds.sequence: Modified 39-residue GIP/GLP-1/glucagon triple-agonist peptide with C20 fatty-acid acylation (LY-3437943).
compounds.storage: Lyophilized: -20°C, 24+ months. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks.
compounds.research_area: Studied in laboratory and preclinical models for its role in GIP, GLP-1, and glucagon receptor signaling relevant to energy-metabolism research.

compounds.name: MOTS-C
compounds.storage: Lyophilized: -20°C, 24+ months. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks.
compounds.research_area: Studied in laboratory models for its role in mitochondrial-derived signaling and cellular metabolic-regulation pathways.

compounds.name: BPC-157
compounds.storage: Lyophilized: -20°C, 24+ months. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks.
compounds.research_area: Studied in laboratory models for its role in tissue-repair, angiogenesis, and gastrointestinal-protection pathways.

compounds.name: GHK-Cu
compounds.storage: Lyophilized: -20°C, 24+ months. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks.
compounds.solubility: Soluble in bacteriostatic water / 0.9% NaCl (blue-tinted solution)
compounds.research_area: Studied in laboratory models for its role in collagen synthesis, wound-healing, and skin-remodeling pathways.

compounds.name: TB-500
compounds.sequence: Ac-LKKTETQ (active Thymosin beta-4 region; full Tβ4: SDKPDMAEIEKFDKSKLKKTETQEKNPLPSKETIEQEKQAGES)
compounds.storage: Lyophilized: -20°C, 24+ months. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks.
compounds.research_area: Studied in laboratory models for its role in actin regulation, cell migration, and tissue-repair pathways.

compounds.name: Ipamorelin
compounds.storage: Lyophilized: -20°C, 24+ months. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks.
compounds.research_area: Studied in laboratory models for its role as a selective ghrelin/growth-hormone-secretagogue receptor agonist in GH-signaling pathways.

compounds.name: Selank
compounds.storage: Lyophilized: -20°C, 24+ months. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks.
compounds.research_area: Studied in laboratory models for its role in anxiolytic-related and immunomodulatory neuropeptide pathways.

compounds.name: Semax
compounds.storage: Lyophilized: -20°C, 24+ months. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks.
compounds.research_area: Studied in laboratory models for its role in neurotrophic (BDNF) signaling and cognition-related neuropeptide pathways.

compounds.name: Tesamorelin
compounds.storage: Lyophilized: -20°C, 24+ months. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks.
compounds.research_area: Studied in laboratory models for its role as a growth-hormone-releasing hormone analog in GH/IGF-1 signaling pathways.

compounds.name: SS-31
compounds.storage: Lyophilized: -20°C, 24+ months. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks.
compounds.research_area: Studied in laboratory models for its role in cardiolipin binding and mitochondrial-membrane/bioenergetics pathways.

compounds.name: NAD+
compounds.storage: Lyophilized: -20°C, protect from light, 24+ months. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks.
compounds.research_area: Studied in laboratory models for its role as a redox coenzyme in cellular energy-metabolism and sirtuin-signaling pathways.

compounds.name: BPC-157 + TB-500
compounds.sequence: Two-peptide blend: BPC-157 (GEPPPGKPADDAGLV) + TB-500 (Thymosin beta-4 region).
compounds.storage: Lyophilized: -20°C, 24+ months. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks.
compounds.research_area: Studied in laboratory models as a combination preparation for its role in tissue-repair, angiogenesis, and cell-migration pathways.

compounds.name: Epithalon
compounds.storage: Lyophilized: -20°C, 24+ months. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks.
compounds.research_area: Studied in laboratory models for its role in telomerase-related and pineal/circadian-regulation pathways.

compounds.name: KPV
compounds.storage: Lyophilized: -20°C, 24+ months. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks.
compounds.research_area: Studied in laboratory models for its role in anti-inflammatory signaling as the C-terminal tripeptide of alpha-MSH.

compounds.name: Melanotan 2
compounds.storage: Lyophilized: -20°C, 24+ months. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 4 weeks.
compounds.research_area: Studied in laboratory models for its role as a non-selective melanocortin-receptor agonist in melanogenesis pathways.

compounds.name: Bacteriostatic Water
compounds.storage: Store at room temperature (15-30°C); once opened use within 28 days.
compounds.solubility: N/A - it is the diluent (sterile water with 0.9% benzyl alcohol)
compounds.research_area: Used in the laboratory to reconstitute and dilute lyophilized peptides for research purposes; the benzyl alcohol acts as a bacteriostatic preservative.
